# buildkit_context (Data Source)

Computes a deterministic, dockerignore-aware SHA256 of a build context directory. Useful as a stable idempotency key (e.g. wired into a `buildkit_image` `triggers` map) so plans only change when the context content changes.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Compute a dockerignore-aware hash of a build context. Wire it into a
# resource's `triggers` so plans only change when the context content changes.

data "buildkit_context" "app" {
  path = "${path.module}/app"
}

output "context_digest" {
  value = data.buildkit_context.app.digest
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `path` (String) Path to the build context directory.

### Optional

- `dockerignore` (String) Optional path to a `.dockerignore` file to use instead of `<path>/.dockerignore`.

### Read-Only

- `digest` (String) `sha256:`-prefixed digest of the included context content.
- `id` (String) Equals `digest`.
